title: tabernaemontana cylindrocarpa
intro: Tabernaemontana cylindrocarpa, also known as the Yellow Formosana or Butterfly Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The medicinal properties of Tabernaemontana cylindrocarpa lie in its alkaloids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antihistamine effects. This plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, offering benefits such as reduced pain and inflammation, improved sleep quality, and enhanced immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Tabernaemontana cylindrocarpa is often prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
